title: Amplified Ore Generation
description: This datapack amplifies vanilla ore generation, making ores more abundant while preserving the original Minecraft gameplay and world features.
body:
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5c51442d2ceca6668b73cc0902872de46f0be7b_0.webp)

This datapack enhances your Minecraft mining experience by significantly amplifying ore generation, making resources like iron, diamonds, and emeralds far more abundant without altering the core vanilla gameplay. Enjoy faster resource gathering as larger, more frequent ore veins appear throughout your world, all while maintaining the classic Minecraft biomes, structures, and mechanics. Whether you're an adventurer, builder, or redstone engineer, this datapack ensures you spend less time searching for ores and more time crafting, exploring, and creating. Perfect for those who want a richer mining experience without deviating from the vanilla feel!

SHOULD be compatible to most mods or datapacks! 


**Disclaimer:** You will get **A LOT** of ore pretty quickly!
